articles.title: It is a Vijay show all the way: TVK chief set to pull off the impossible without ideological base or second-rung leaders
articles.excerpt: Tamil Nadu created history six decades ago when it became the first state to elect a regional party to power, ending the Congress's hegemony. Another watershed moment may be unfolding again this time around.
articles.content: Tamil Nadu created history six decades ago when it became the first state to elect a regional party to power, ending the Congress's hegemony. Another watershed moment may be unfolding again this time around.
